events.label: reasoning
events.text: We are asked to assess structural bolting with DTI squirter washers not fully crushed. The work is rough-complete. Reference: RCSC Specification. DTI (Direct Tension Indicator) washers are used to indicate proper bolt tension. If they are not fully crushed, that means the bolt may not have achieved the required pretension. According to RCSC, DTI washers must be properly installed and the gap must be within specified limits. Not fully crushed indicates insufficient tension, which is a defect. So the work is non-compliant. Decision: fail. Risk: high or critical? Structural bolting failure can lead to collapse, so critical. Work stage: rough-complete. Component conditions: installed-defective, non-compliant. Percent complete: maybe 90%? But we don't know exactly, but it's roughed in, so maybe 80-90%. I'll put 85. Value: not applicable. Confidence: high. Findings: "DTI squirter washers not fully crushed, indicating insufficient bolt tension." Actions: "Re-tension or replace bolts to achieve proper DTI washer crush per RCSC requirements." Rationale: "RCSC Specification requires DTI washers to be fully crushed to ensure proper pretension. Not fully crushed means bolts are under-tensioned, compromising structural integrity." References: "RCSC Specification Section 8.2.4" or similar. I'll use "RCSC Specification, Section 8.2.4" (or whatever is appropriate). I'll output JSON.
